stat: Personalized subject lines increase opens by ~26% in B2B tests.
Subject lines of 3–5 words saw ~21% higher open rates on average.
61% of business emails are first opened on mobile.
One clear CTA increased replies by ~32% in B2B sequences.
Polite follow-ups (1–2) can roughly double reply rates.
Emails under ~125 words yielded ~50% higher replies in sales outreach.
Using preview text thoughtfully added ~7% lift in opens.
Tuesday–Thursday, 8–11am local time correlated with ~18% more opens.
Including a short credibility cue (logo or metric) increased replies by ~15%.
Question-style subject lines saw ~10% more opens in testing.
